title: ALife Sandbox Action Schema
description: The restricted communication channel for agents. Agents must output JSON matching this schema to interact with the environment.

action.description: The chosen action for this tick.

target_id.description: Required if action is 'transfer'. ID of the agent to give energy to (must be in the 3x3 local grid).

amount.description: Required if action is 'transfer'. Amount of energy to give.
